string.text: You need to capture and hold the specified object under your control
Hold the point until allies arrive
An enemy has been spotted around this point. An attack is expected any moment.
An enemy has attacked the squad. You need to help them repel the attack.
Eliminate the enemy at the key location
Repel the enemy's counterattack at the point
The reward is waiting at the faction trader
You need to help the squad break through
You need to push the enemy out of this area: this will weaken their positions

The psi-radiation levels at the station are off the charts, but the Gunslinger is protected by a prototype. If you disable this device, you can stop the Gunslinger. The electronics of the prototype can be disabled from a distance with an electromagnetic rifle.
Find the teleport leading to the heat pipeline
The area around the station is filled with teleports. To fire at the Gunslinger, you need to return to the heat pipeline. Find the teleport that leads back to the heat pipeline.
